package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_error_handling_cost_error_string_built_before_error_needed: Layer: Error handling cost. Flag error message formatting before the code knows an error will be returned.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule529NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario529Negative(records []Rule529NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
